title: Non-compliant matching JSON: bottle size 1500 mL (jpeg-noise, level 9, upside-down)

form_data.reason: 1500 mL is not an approved TTB standard fill size (1750 mL is approved, not 1500).

image_prompt: Photorealistic very large glass bottle with a snowy mountain label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Alpine Peak', 'Gin', '40% Alc./Vol.', '1500 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Alpine Spirits, Denver, CO'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has severe compression artifacts and sensor noise. Camera orientation is upside-down (180 degrees). The photo is upside down and needs rotation before automated approval.
